text:
Hunter × Hunter Best Sound Collection is a compilation between Hunter × Hunter Original Soundtrack Vol. 1, 2, 3, the OVA Original Soundtrack and the Greed Island OVA Original Soundtrack. It was released in Japan on November 25, 2004.
